message:
test(workflows): add 50 unit tests for coordination module

Comprehensive coverage for multi-pane coordination primitives:
- build_pane_groups: all 4 strategies (ByDomain, ByAgent, ByProject, Explicit)
- infer_agent_from_title: codex, claude_code, gemini, unknown
- BroadcastPrecondition::check: all 4 preconditions
- check_preconditions: all-pass and multi-failure cases
- BroadcastResult counters: allowed/denied/precondition_failed/skipped/all_allowed
- evaluate_pane_preconditions: mixed capabilities and missing entries
- plan_reread_context / plan_pause_all coordination planning
- resolve_reread_prompts / resolve_pause_texts agent-specific text
- truncate_snippet: short/exact/overflow/zero/small/whitespace/multibyte UTF-8
- UnstickFindingKind serde roundtrip and labels
- UnstickReport empty and human_summary formatting
- scan_file_text: TODO, panic site, max_per_kind limit
- CoordinateAgentsConfig defaults and serde roundtrip
- PaneGroup len/is_empty helpers
- CoordinationResult totals
- GroupLockResult with PaneWorkflowLockManager: all-free and rollback
- PaneBroadcastOutcome and BroadcastPrecondition serde roundtrips

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
